Summary:
Experiment parallel-marking-experiment-2
StartDate 2023-12-23
EndDate 2024-01-08
Channel nightly
Branches disabled enabled
All
metric
branch All results compared against control.
uplift
effect size (mwu) Effect size calculated by Rank Biserial Correlation.
perf_page_load_time_ms Time in milliseconds from navigationStart to loadEventStart for the foreground http or https root content document.
enabled
-6.6%
Small (r=-0.03)
time_to_first_interaction_ms Time in milliseconds from the first non-blank paint to the creation time of the next click, key, mouse or scroll event per top-level content browsing context.
enabled
-3.1%
None (p=0.06)
perf_first_contentful_paint_ms The time between navigationStart and the first contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint.
enabled
-5.0%
Small (r=-0.01)
js_pageload_execution_ms Time spent during page load executing Javascript in ms.
enabled
-2.2%
Small (r=-0.03)
memory_total Total Memory Across All Processes (KB) (inaccurate WRT shared memory. See MemoryTelemetry.cpp)
enabled
-1.7%
None (p=0.29)
input_event_response_ms Time (ms) from the Input event being created to the end of it being handled
enabled
-5.1%
None (p=0.06)
cycle_collector_max_pause Longest pause for an individual slice of one cycle collection, including preparation (ms)
enabled
+8.4%
None (p=0.73)
gc_max_pause_ms_2 Longest GC slice in a GC (ms)
enabled
-13.1%
Medium (r=-0.07)
gc_ms Time spent running JS GC (ms)
enabled
-31.5%
Large (r=-0.12)
gc_mark_ms Time spent running JS GC mark phase (ms)
enabled
-29.9%
Medium (r=-0.10)
gc_mark_rate_2 The number of objects marked per ms during GC.
enabled
+36.1%
Large (r=0.34)
gc_sweep_ms Time spent running JS GC sweep phase (ms)
enabled
-15.6%
Small (r=-0.04)
gc_slice_count The number of slices in an incremental GC for the main runtime
enabled
-21.1%
Medium (r=-0.08)
gc_budget_overrun How long a GC slice ran over its budget in microseconds
enabled
+31.0%
Large (r=0.38)
gc_task_start_delay_us Delay between queuing a GC task and the task starting.
enabled
-17.8%
Large (r=-0.15)

enabled
-1.8%

enabled

enabled

Configuration & Queries Used: 

  {
    "slug": "parallel-marking-experiment-2",
    "histograms": {
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms": {
            "desc": "Time in milliseconds from navigationStart to loadEventStart for the foreground http or https root content document.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.time_to_first_interaction_ms": {
            "desc": "Time in milliseconds from the first non-blank paint to the creation time of the next click, key, mouse or scroll event per top-level content browsing context.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms": {
            "desc": "The time between navigationStart and the first contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.js_pageload_execution_ms": {
            "desc": "Time spent during page load executing Javascript in ms.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.histograms.memory_total": {
            "desc": "Total Memory Across All Processes (KB) (inaccurate WRT shared memory. See MemoryTelemetry.cpp)",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.input_event_response_ms": {
            "desc": "Time (ms) from the Input event being created to the end of it being handled",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.cycle_collector_max_pause": {
            "desc": "Longest pause for an individual slice of one cycle collection, including preparation (ms)",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_max_pause_ms_2": {
            "desc": "Longest GC slice in a GC (ms)",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_ms": {
            "desc": "Time spent running JS GC (ms)",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_mark_ms": {
            "desc": "Time spent running JS GC mark phase (ms)",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_mark_rate_2": {
            "desc": "The number of objects marked per ms during GC.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_sweep_ms": {
            "desc": "Time spent running JS GC sweep phase (ms)",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_slice_count": {
            "desc": "The number of slices in an incremental GC for the main runtime",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_slice_was_long": {
            "desc": "Whether a GC slice took 1.5 times or 5ms more than its budget",
            "kind": "categorical",
            "labels": [
                "no",
                "yes"
            ]
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_budget_overrun": {
            "desc": "How long a GC slice ran over its budget in microseconds",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_budget_was_increased": {
            "desc": "Whether the budget was increased due to taking too long or approaching the incremental limit",
            "kind": "categorical",
            "labels": [
                "no",
                "yes"
            ]
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_task_start_delay_us": {
            "desc": "Delay between queuing a GC task and the task starting.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        }
    },
    "pageload_event_metrics": {
        "fcp_time": {
            "desc": "Time between firstContentfulPaint and navigationStart, in ms.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 10000
        },
        "load_time": {
            "desc": "Time between loadEventStart and navigationStart, in ms.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 30000
        },
        "response_time": {
            "desc": "Time between responseStart and navigationStart, in ms.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 10000
        },
        "js_exec_time": {
            "desc": "Time spent executing JS during page load, in ms.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 10000
        }
    },
    "segments": {
        "All": [],
        "Windows": [],
        "Linux": [],
        "Mac": []
    },
    "is_experiment": true,
    "startDate": "2023-12-23",
    "endDate": "2024-01-08",
    "channel": "nightly",
    "branches": [
        "disabled",
        "enabled"
    ]
}
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'fcp_time') AS int) AS fcp_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "nightly"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  fcp_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  fcp_time >= 0 AND fcp_time <= 10000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'load_time') AS int) AS load_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "nightly"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  load_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  load_time >= 0 AND load_time <= 30000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'response_time') AS int) AS response_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "nightly"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  response_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  response_time >= 0 AND response_time <= 10000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'js_exec_time') AS int) AS js_exec_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "nightly"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  js_exec_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  js_exec_time >= 0 AND js_exec_time <= 10000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main_nightly`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.time_to_first_interaction_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main_nightly`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.time_to_first_interaction_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main_nightly`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.js_pageload_execution_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main_nightly`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.js_pageload_execution_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null

    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT

GROUP BY

ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,

        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.histograms.memory_total is not null

        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0

  with json_strings as (

        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.cycle_collector_max_pause, '$.values') as hist

    WHERE

        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.cycle_collector_max_pause is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0

        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_max_pause_ms_2, '$.values') as hist

        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')

        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_ms, '$.values') as hist

        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_ms is not null

        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null

SELECT

GROUP BY

        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0

    SELECT

        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,

        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main_nightly`
    WHERE

        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_mark_rate_2 is not null

    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key

        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_sweep_ms, '$.values') as hist

ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_slice_count, '$.values') as hist

        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main_nightly`

        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')

        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_slice_count is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null

    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key

SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,

FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_slice_was_long, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main_nightly`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_slice_was_long is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_budget_overrun, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main_nightly`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_budget_overrun is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_budget_was_increased, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main_nightly`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_budget_was_increased is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_parallel_mark_speedup, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main_nightly`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_parallel_mark_speedup is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_parallel_mark_utilization, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main_nightly`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_parallel_mark_utilization is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_parallel_mark_interruptions, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main_nightly`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_parallel_mark_interruptions is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_task_start_delay_us, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main_nightly`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_task_start_delay_us is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
